🔄 Real-Time Sync Status
✓ Same-browser sync active — changes you make appear instantly in other tabs of this browser.
Auto-refresh runs every 8 seconds to detect changes from other devices.
🚀 For instant cross-device sync (optional): To see updates instantly across different devices and browsers in real-time, connect Firebase Firestore:
1. Go to console.firebase.google.com → Create project → Add web app
2. Enable Firestore Database in your project
3. Paste your Firebase config into the top of app.js replacing the placeholder values
4. Set Firestore rules to allow reads/writes for authenticated users

Until then, the site fully works — all data saves locally and syncs across tabs in the same browser.

Terms of Service

Last Updated: April 2025

Welcome to the Where It All Began Community Portal. By registering and using this portal, you agree to the following terms.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By creating an account, you confirm that you are at least 18 years old and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not register.

2. Account Registration

You agree to provide accurate and truthful information when creating your account. Accounts must be approved by the director before access is granted. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and for all activity under your account.

3. Story Submissions

By submitting a story or answering questions through this portal, you grant Where It All Began a non-exclusive license to feature your story on the podcast and related platforms. You retain ownership of your personal story. Submissions marked "Anonymous" will not be attributed to you publicly.

4. Community Standards

You agree not to post content that is hateful, threatening, harassing, obscene, or otherwise harmful. Where It All Began reserves the right to remove any content and deactivate any account that violates these standards at any time without notice.

5. Privacy

Your personal information is handled in accordance with our Privacy Policy. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.

6. Intellectual Property

All content produced by Where It All Began, including podcast episodes, branding, and written materials, is protected by copyright. You may not reproduce or distribute this content without express written permission.

7. Account Termination

The director reserves the right to deactivate or delete any account for any reason, including violation of these Terms. You may request deletion of your account by contacting us directly.

8. Disclaimer

This portal is provided "as is." Where It All Began makes no warranties about the availability or reliability of the platform. We are not liable for any loss or damage arising from your use of the portal.

9. Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the portal after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

10. Contact

For questions about these Terms, contact us at: whereitallbegan1@yahoo.com

Privacy Policy

Last Updated: April 2025

Where It All Began ("we," "us," or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use the Community Portal.

1. Information We Collect

When you register, we collect your first and last name, email address, phone number, date of birth, and city/state. When you submit story answers or messages, that content is also stored. We do not collect payment information.

2. How We Use Your Information

We use your information to: create and manage your account, send you email notifications about your membership status, communicate story-related updates from the director, and improve the portal experience. We will never sell your personal data to third parties.

3. Email Communications

By registering, you agree to receive transactional emails from whereitallbegan1@yahoo.com. These include account activation notices, director replies, and important updates. You may contact us to opt out of non-essential communications.

4. Data Storage

Your data is currently stored in your browser's local storage. This means your data is stored on the device you use to access the portal. We are not responsible for data loss due to browser clearing or device changes.

5. Data Sharing

We do not share your personal information with any third parties except as required by law. Story submissions may be shared publicly on the podcast if you have consented. Anonymous submissions will not include your name.

6. Your Rights

You have the right to: access the personal information we hold about you, request correction of inaccurate information, request deletion of your account and data, and withdraw consent to story use at any time by contacting us.

7. Cookies

This portal does not currently use tracking cookies. Local storage is used solely to maintain your session and portal data.

8. Children's Privacy

This portal is intended for users 18 and older. We do not knowingly collect information from minors. If we become aware that a minor has registered, we will deactivate that account.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify registered members of significant changes via email.

10. Contact Us

If you have questions about your privacy or this policy, email us at: whereitallbegan1@yahoo.com
